Notice Of Intention To Move For New Trial
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gregory Haynes, Esq., Attorney-at-Law, (415-546-0777), for Marilou D. Samson, Plaintiff and moving party.
Anton L. Hasenkampf, Esq. of Allen Matkins, (415-273-7464), for One West Bank and US Bank National Association, Defendants and opposing parties.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MARILOU SAMSON's Notice Of Intention To Move For New Trial is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to carry her burden under CCP 657(7). Plaintiff was given 4 opportunities to allege a viable cause of action against named defendants. Plaintiff concedes that property was sold to a non-party. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

ARGUED - Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ONE WEST BANK, FSB's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.
